content:
QBR SUMMARY
Customer: Harmon Retail Group
Customer ID: C005
Contract ID: K022
Account Executive: James Okafor
Period: H2 2025 (July – December 2025)
Meeting Date: December 10, 2025
Attendees: James Okafor (AE), Sandra Harmon (COO), Marcus Lee (Distribution Center Manager), Priya Kapoor (Head of Product, DataSync Pro)

BUSINESS PERFORMANCE
Harmon Retail closed 2025 with 28 company-owned stores, 16 franchise locations, and two operational distribution centers. Sandra Harmon noted 2025 was a milestone year for the company's operational infrastructure.

PLATFORM USAGE
83 licensed users active following the addition of the second distribution center team in Q4 2025. Weekly active rate is 91%. Mobile usage at 67%.

KEY DISCUSSION POINTS
- Priya Kapoor joined the call at James Okafor's request to address the franchise access issue directly. She confirmed the read-only franchise tier is in active development and committed to a Q2 2026 beta with Harmon Retail as a design partner
- Sandra Harmon responded positively to Priya's direct commitment and the design partner offer — this was described as the conversation she had been waiting two years to have
- Second distribution center adoption has been smooth — Marcus Lee reported full team adoption within three weeks of go-live
- 2026 renewal discussion initiated — Sandra confirmed intent to renew and expressed interest in the design partner program for the franchise tier

SATISFACTION RATING: 4.5/5
Sandra Harmon: "Having Priya on this call made a real difference. A direct commitment from product, not just account management, is what I needed. We're in for 2026."

ACTION ITEMS
- Priya Kapoor to send franchise tier design partner agreement to Sandra Harmon by December 20
- James Okafor to prepare 2026 renewal proposal including 83 users and design partner terms by January 2026
- Schedule Q1 2026 design partner kickoff session

NEXT QBR: July 2026
